Sloka 6: Now the general result of Vasi Yoga is discussed. The
native bom in Vasi Yoga will speak in a high pitch (i.e ... a the top of his
voice), harve a well-developed body above the waist. will be always gay.
wit look through the corners of his eyes, will be stout, equal to a king,
polite in character. knowing smritis. and will be busy.
